title: hieracium murorum subsp. subcrassifolium
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. subcrassifolium, also known as a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. subcrassifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve liver function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for liver and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be consumed raw or dried as a supplement.
